name: writing-loop
description: An autonomous short-drama (茗뒨쏊麵쇈곦) writers' room in a folder. Nine agents plan, outline, write, review, score, and market-watch vertical micro-drama scripts through ticket state on a local board; a story bible + beat cards + ledgers keep 60-100 episode serials coherent; a 4-dimension/16-indicator rubric gates milestones. Runs on Claude Code or Codex.

interface.longDescription: Nine agents (Showrunner, Story-Designer, Episode-Writer, Reviewer, Script-Doctor, Evaluator, Market-Watch, Reflect, Sweep) plan, outline, write, review, and score vertical micro-drama (茗뒨쏊麵쇈곦) scripts through ticket state on a local file board. North-star bible + per-arc beat cards + foreshadow/story-state/production ledgers keep 60-100 episode serials coherent; a rubric gates milestones (outline, first-paywall pack, finale). Novel-adaptation or original-creation intake.
